content.en:
After the three invincible-level fifth-stage great ancestors of the Huanyu Alliance came, they immediately came to help Ye Tian deal with the other three invincible-level fifth-stage great ancestors.

Rumble!!!!

The fight has begun!

At this moment, it is equivalent to four to three, and the three fifth-stage great ancestors saw that the situation was not good, and they slipped away directly.

"Thank you three great ancestors for your help!"

Ye Tian thanked, and immediately took out three pieces of Tongtian True Gold, one for each person as a reward.

These three invincible-level fifth-stage great ancestors were happy in their hearts, just came over to help, and drove away the three fifth-stage great ancestors to obtain a piece of innocent gold, such a deal is too easy to make!

Immediately, they directly escorted Ye Tian out of this area, and after making sure that it was safe, they left one after another.

......

"It's back!"

Ye Tian returned to the Xuanqi Realm, and this was truly relieved.

The harvest this time was too great, and many resources were simply unavailable, and even the cultivation resources of the ten-armed golden body were about to be scrapped.

In addition, there are many resources that can assist in refining the whole body.

He felt that it would not take too long for him to complete the thirteenth full-body tempering.

In the years that followed, while refining his whole body, he also let the other replica bodies that remained inside the Eternal Ruins continue to search for resources.

In this way, there is no delay.

And it wasn't long before he learned the origin of the white crystal.

"Xuantian Platinum!"

He only knew that Xuantian Platinum was very important to Heavenly Ancestor, and it was even enough to make Heavenly Ancestor take risks.

He tried to copy Xuantian Platinum, but found that he couldn't.

Obviously, Xuantian Platinum's grade exceeded the ability of the copying talent to copy all things.

He harvested this Xuantian platinum and waited for it to be used after becoming a Heavenly Ancestor in the future.

In the following years, he was also collecting the remaining two materials for cultivating the ten-armed golden body, and if he got it together, he would be able to cultivate the ten-armed golden body.

Since he had obtained a lot of resources from the Eternal Ruins that would help him refine his whole body quickly, he was able to refine his whole body very quickly.

After 100 million years of the first year, he finally completed the last and thirteenth full-body refinement.

Rumble!!!

With the completion of the thirteenth full-body refinement, Ye Tian's body transformed again, and in the fourth stage of the high-level immeasurable life form stage, he truly reached the level of perfection and could not advance.

"With my current strength, it shouldn't be difficult to break through the third layer of the Huanyu Tower!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He then used his second chance to go to the Cosmos Tower.

Airplanes!

On the third floor of the Huanyu Tower, Ye Tian came to a void.

The Cosmos Tower directly confronted an unknown creature with the peak fifth-stage combat power.

In an instant, Ye Tian fought with this creature.

As a result of completing the thirteenth full-body tempering, his strength was now at the top of the peak fifth stage, thus completely suppressing the creature.

After a long time, the other party began to get hurt.

Ye Tian, on the other hand, was not injured.

After a long time, Ye Tian was slightly injured, and the other party was on the verge of death.

"Kill!"

The final blow.

Ye Tian directly killed the other party and broke through the third layer of the Huanyu Tower.

At this point, his authority becomes the core member authority.

At the same time, the rewards of the Universal Tower have arrived.

"It's an immeasurable magical inheritance!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

If it is an ordinary inheritance of immeasurable supernatural powers, it is of no value, the key is that this is actually the Heaven Slayer Blade that ranks fifth on the list of immeasurable supernatural powers!

The grade of this immeasurable magic technique is still above the ten-armed golden body, and its value is unimaginable!

Of course, this immeasurable supernatural power technique is also more difficult to cultivate, and it requires the mobilization of the power of the thirty-six super-quality immeasurable bones, so it requires that all thirty-six immeasurable bones must reach the super-quality.

Moreover, its cultivation difficulty is very high, and once it fails, it will cause damage to the immeasurable bones, and even the evil people dare not practice casually.

There are also a lot of materials needed to cultivate the Heaven Slaying Blade, a total of eighteen kinds of materials are needed, and all of them are extremely rare materials.

"I've found eight of the materials, and there are only ten materials left to collect!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In a short period of time, he still can't cultivate the Heaven Slaying Blade, but he can first cultivate into a ten-armed golden body.

this day.

Ye Tian traded with a fifth-stage great ancestor in the Huanyu Alliance and obtained a material, the Cave Heaven Thunder Stone, which was the ninth material needed for the ten-armed golden body.

"Only the material of the Blood Realm Underworld is left!"

However, he also has information on this material.

There are several forces that possess the Blood Realm Underworld, and one of them is the Blood Hidden Mountain.

However, the Blood Realm Stygian Wood is very important to the Blood Shadow Mountain, and it is one of the necessary materials for the Ten Arms Golden Body, so it is very difficult to obtain the Blood Realm Stygian Wood from the Blood Shadow Mountain.

At the moment, he doesn't have a good way either.

However, he has already issued a mission within the Universal Alliance, so he can only wait for news slowly.

this day.

Ye Tian finally contacted the Blood Mountain through the relationship of the Huanyu Alliance, and the Blood Mountain was also willing to trade with Ye Tian for the sake of Ye Tian being a member of the Huanyu League.

However, Ye Tian had to take out a piece of the Universal Order and a piece of Tongtian True Gold to make a deal with Ye Tian.

The Universal Order is very precious and very valuable.

Maybe the other fifth-stage Great Ancestors who broke into the Huanyu Tower were not as precious as Ye Tian's rewards, but they would definitely not be too bad.

Moreover, the value of Tongtian True Gold is still above the Blood Realm Underworld.

It can be said that this condition of the Blood Mountain is really excessive.

If it were other Great Ancestors, they would definitely not agree to this deal.

However, Ye Tian only had the last material left, and after thinking about it carefully, he still agreed to the transaction.

......

Bloody Mountain.

The two Invincible Level 5 Great Ancestors were chatting.

These two are Zhenyuan Great Ancestor and Heaven Breaking Great Ancestor.

"Just now, there was news from the Universe Alliance that the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform called the Endless Great Ancestor was willing to trade with a Universe Order and a piece of Heavenly True Gold!"

Zhenyuan Great Ancestor was a little surprised: "This Endless Great Ancestor is a little not simple, he has entered the Eternal True Ruins before and came out alive, and he also has the Infinite Realm Armor, and he also used three pieces of Heavenly True Gold to ask the three invincible fifth-stage Great Ancestors of the Huanyu Alliance to make a move." Now, he is still willing to use the Universal Order and Tongtian Zhenjin to trade the Blood Realm Stygian Wood with us, and he is very expensive!"

"What is the origin of the Endless Great Ancestor, he must have a lot of super-quality immeasurable bones, and the materials required for the immeasurable magic technique of the ten-armed golden body are estimated to be almost complete, otherwise he would not agree to such an outrageous deal. The Heaven Breaking Ancestor said curiously.

"Whatever the origin, this deal can be done. Moreover, you must also agree, otherwise if you regret it, it will be easy to offend a great ancestor with unlimited potential. "Zhenyuan Great Ancestor Dao.

"Hmm!"

The Heaven Breaking Ancestor nodded.
